case_title: SARAH ATTIA VS. NEW VISION RESTAURANT PARTNERS, A CALIFORNIA LIMIT

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ATTIA, SARAH AS TO DEFENDANT NEW VISION RESTAURANT PARTNERS, A CALIFORNIA LIMIT ED LIABILITY PARTNERSHIP DBA CYPRESS CLUB JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
